{"cards": [{"name": "Pyroclastic Choice", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact or enchantment. ~ deals 2 damage to that permanent's controller.
• Create two 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens with haste.", "flavor_text": "The volcano offers destruction, freedom, or fury—all three if you're not careful.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal instant showcasing red's versatility: direct damage (primary), artifact/enchantment destruction with punishment (secondary), and aggressive token creation. Each mode is independently useful but not overpowered for 4 mana. Tests modal formatting with three distinct options."}, {"name": "Song of Ancient Groves", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.
II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
III — You gain 2 life for each creature you control, then draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Three-chapter Saga following green's themes: land ramp (I), creature enhancement (II), and life gain with card draw (III). Each chapter builds on the previous, creating a coherent narrative of growth and abundance. Tests Saga templating with Roman numerals and escalating effects."}, {"name": "Crystalline Caverns", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "The crystal formations revealed glimpses of possible futures, each facet showing a different path.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Colorless utility land with enters-tapped drawback balanced by scry ability. The {3} activation cost makes it a meaningful decision while providing late-game value. Tests basic land templating with activated abilities and enters-tapped timing."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Where sunlight dances through emerald leaves, life flourishes in countless forms.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Standard basic Forest with evocative flavor text emphasizing the connection between light, nature, and life's diversity. Tests basic land generation with the classic mana ability and atmospheric flavor text."}]}
